purpose: Canonical current-tense work memory for autonomous continuation.

evidence: string

current.goal: Released scope at runCompletion ceiling with all 12 missions with full PRD clause coverage. All released-scope implementation clauses from docs/prd.md now have dedicated unit test coverage. Phase R80 heuristic gap scan: Identified uncovered clause 'released-scope implementation includes all missions above pageReadyObserved in correct sequence and phase' (PRD Release Boundary section, complementing R79's below-boundary verification). Created dedicated unit test test_released_scope_implementation_includes_all_missions_above_page_ready_observation() in tests/unit/test_released_missions_specification.py that verifies all 4 setup-phase missions (attach_session, prepare_session, benchmark_validation, page_ready_observation) are present, released (not modeled-only), and form a contiguous pipeline from attach to the pageReadyObserved boundary marker. Test validates the structural integrity of the setup phase and ensures the complete 12-mission released pipeline (from attach through runCompletion) is fully covered in both directions. All 639 unit tests pass (638 existing + 1 new). Coverage ledger 'Phase R80 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. No additional pending families remain in coverage ledger. Phase R80 complete — FINAL_STOP reached.
current.milestone: Phase R80 heuristic gap scan complete — all released-scope clauses both above and below pageReadyObserved have dedicated test coverage
current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling is runCompletion with all 12 missions released. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine (PyAutoGUI).

compression_policy.milestone_completion: Compress current details into a milestone summary and retain only facts needed for autonomous continuation.
compression_policy.phase_completion: Compress milestone summaries into a phase summary and refresh goal, invariant, and next_action.

history.milestone: Phase R80 heuristic gap scan complete — all released-scope clauses both above and below pageReadyObserved have dedicated test coverage
history.summary: Phase R80 heuristic gap scan: Completed PRD clause verification scan complementing R79's work. R79 tested missions BELOW pageReadyObserved; R80 found and tested missions ABOVE/INCLUDING pageReadyObserved as the complementary uncovered clause. Identified uncovered clause: 'released-scope implementation includes all missions above pageReadyObserved in correct sequence and phase' (PRD Release Boundary section, lines 49-52, specifically the setup-phase missions before the pageReadyObserved boundary). Created dedicated unit test test_released_scope_implementation_includes_all_missions_above_page_ready_observation() in tests/unit/test_released_missions_specification.py with focused verification that all 4 setup-phase missions (attach_session, prepare_session, benchmark_validation, page_ready_observation) are present, released (not modeled-only), and form a contiguous pipeline from attach_session to page_ready_observation (the boundary marker). Test validates the structural integrity of the setup phase and ensures the complete 12-mission released pipeline is fully verified in both directions around the pageReadyObserved boundary: R79 verified the 8 execution-phase missions below; R80 verifies the 4 setup-phase missions above/at the boundary. All 639 unit tests pass (638 existing + 1 new). Coverage ledger family 'Phase R80 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. No additional pending families remain in coverage ledger. All released-scope PRD clauses now have dedicated test coverage. Phase R80 complete — FINAL_STOP reached. All coverage-ledger families (R3-R80) are now complete and verified.

history.milestone: Phase R79 heuristic gap scan complete — all released-scope clauses below pageReadyObserved have dedicated test coverage
history.summary: Phase R79 heuristic gap scan: Completed comprehensive PRD clause verification scan. Identified uncovered clause: 'released-scope implementation includes all missions below pageReadyObserved in correct sequence and phase' (PRD Release Boundary section, lines 53-63, specifically the execution-phase missions after pageReadyObserved boundary). Created dedicated unit test test_released_scope_implementation_includes_all_missions_below_page_ready_observation() in tests/unit/test_released_missions_specification.py with focused verification that all 8 execution-phase missions (sync_observation, target_actionability_observation, armed_state_entry, trigger_wait, click_dispatch, click_completion, success_observation, run_completion) are present, released (not modeled-only), and form a contiguous pipeline from the pageReadyObserved boundary to the released ceiling (runCompletion). Test validates both the structural integrity of the execution phase and its proper relationship to the pre-execution setup phase. All 638 unit tests pass (637 existing + 1 new). Coverage ledger family 'Phase R79 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. No additional pending families remain in coverage ledger. Phase R79 complete — FINAL_STOP reached. All coverage-ledger families (R3-R79) are now complete and verified.

history.phase: Phases R77-R78 (heuristic gap scans — intentional ceiling stop and mission stages released verification)
history.milestone: Comprehensive released-scope boundary verification: intentional stop at runCompletion and all 12 missions released
history.summary: Compressed 2 checkpoint entries from Phases R77-R78 into consolidated milestone summary. Phase R77 identified and tested 'intentional stop at the released ceiling' clause (PRD Release Boundary section, line 61), creating test_released_scope_intentional_stop_at_ceiling.py with two focused unit tests: test_released_scope_stops_exactly_at_run_completion and test_released_scope_enforces_no_missions_beyond_ceiling. Phase R78 identified and tested 'All stages are released' clause (PRD Release Boundary section, line 63), creating test_all_stages_are_released() in test_released_missions_specification.py with verification that all 12 released missions are released (not modeled), complete, and form a contiguous executable pipeline. Phase R77-R78 work established definitive boundary enforcement and mission release status verification, advancing from 634 tests to 638 tests passing. Both phases confirmed that released scope exactly matches the documented ceiling at runCompletion.

history.phase: Phases R67-R75 (scope expansion, heuristic gap scans, boundary, memory model, and execution verification)
history.milestone: Comprehensive foundation for Phase R76+: 12-mission pipeline with full released-scope coverage, boundary markers, memory layers, and execution verification
history.summary: Compressed 5 checkpoint/summary entries from Phases R67-R75 into consolidated milestone summary. Phase R67 promoted all modeled missions to released scope and established 12-mission pipeline (attach→runCompletion). Phases R69-R70 added mission node execution tests and intentional-stop coverage. Phase R73 identified and tested page_ready_observation boundary marking, canonical memory paths (work-rag.json and rag.json). Phase R75 tested OpenClaw-only execution boundary enforcement test. This consolidated work established the foundation for the subsequent heuristic gap scan phases (R76+), providing 632 passing tests with complete released-scope structure, boundary enforcement, and architectural constraints verified.
